word.tr_en: before; in the past; prior to

phrase.tr_en: compared with how it was before

phrase.ph: 【出：しゅっ】【発：ぱつ】【以：い】【前：ぜん】に

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【以：い】【前：ぜん】ほど【太：ふと】ってない。
sentence.rom: Kare wa izen hodo futotte nai.
sentence.tr_en: He is not as fat as he was.
sentence.tr_de: Er ist nicht mehr so fett wie früher.

sentence.s: 【以：い】【前：ぜん】と【同：おな】じ【間：ま】【違：ちが】いをしちゃった。
sentence.rom: Izen to onaji machigai o shichatta.
sentence.tr_en: I made the same mistake as before.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe den gleiche Fehler wie früher gemacht.

sentence.s: 【以：い】【前：ぜん】は【毎：まい】【朝：あさ】 【散：さん】【歩：ぽ】していました。
sentence.rom: Izen wa mai-asa sanpo shite imashita.
sentence.tr_en: I used to take a walk every morning.
sentence.tr_de: Früher habe ich jeden Morgen einen Spaziergang gemacht.

word.tr_en: each (person); individually; one by one; one at a time; in turn
at that time; in those days

sentence.s: 【塩：しお】をちょうだい。
sentence.rom: Shio o chōdai.
sentence.tr_en: Pass me the salt, please.
sentence.tr_de: Bitte reiche mir das Salz.

sentence.s: 【赤：あか】い【本：ほん】を【渡：わた】してちょうだい。
sentence.rom: Akai hon o watashite chōdai.
sentence.tr_en: Would you pass me the red book, please?
sentence.tr_de: Könntest du mir bitte das rote Buch reichen?

phrase.ph: 【海：かい】【外：がい】【旅：りょ】【行：こう】

sentence.s: 【空：くう】【港：こう】で【海：かい】【外：がい】からの【観：かん】【光：こう】【客：きゃく】を【出：で】【迎：むか】える。
sentence.rom: Kūkō de kaigai kara no kankō-kyaku o demukaeru.
sentence.tr_en: (I'll) meet the overseas tourists at the airport.
sentence.tr_de: (Ich werde) die Überseetouristen am Flughafen treffen.

word.tr_en: all of us; everybody; the whole crew
word.tr_de: wir alle; jedermann; die ganze Meute

phrase.ph: 【全：ぜん】【員：いん】【出：しゅっ】【席：せき】

sentence.s: 【全：ぜん】【員：いん】その【車：くるま】に【乗：の】った。
sentence.rom: Zen'in sono kuruma ni notta.
sentence.tr_en: The whole crew got into the car.
sentence.tr_de: Die ganze Meute stieg in das Auto ein.

word.tr_en: at one time; formerly; one o'clock
word.rem: why is this n3? formerly?? needs example

sentence.s: 【寒：さむ】い【日：ひ】には、【温：あたた】かいお【風：ふ】【呂：ろ】が【最：さい】【高：こう】です。
sentence.rom: Samui hi ni wa, atatakai o-furo ga saikō desu.
sentence.tr_en: On cold days, a warm bath is the best.
sentence.tr_de: An einem kalten Tag ist ein warmes Bad das beste.

word.rem: appears in 500mon N3 q50

sentence.s: この【野：や】【菜：さい】は【生：なま】では【食：た】べられません。
sentence.rom: Kono yasai wa nama de wa taberaremasen.
sentence.tr_en: You cannot eat this vegetable raw.
sentence.tr_de: Dieses Gemüse ist roh nicht essbar.

word.rem: ippanteki is a na-adjective

phrase.rem: jisho has n2; ChatGPT: sometimes close to 'trait', can apply to people or things

phrase.ph: 【質：しつ】の【低：ひく】い【教：きょう】【育：いく】

sentence.s: この【犬：いぬ】は【性：せい】【質：しつ】が【穏：おだ】やかですね。
sentence.rom: Kono inu wa sei-shitsu ga odayaka desu ne.
sentence.tr_en: This dog has a calm nature, don't you think?
sentence.tr_de: Dieser Hund ist von einer gelassenen Natur, findest du nicht?

sentence.s: このパソコンの【品：ひん】【質：しつ】はあまり【良：よ】くないと【思：おも】います。
sentence.rom: Kono pasokon no hin-shitsu wa amari yokunai to omoimasu.
sentence.tr_en: I don't think the quality of this computer is very good.
sentence.tr_de: Ich finde nicht, dass die Qualität dieses Computers besonders gut ist.

word.tr_en: suffix used to form adjectives from nouns
word.tr_de: Suffix, um Adjektive aus Nomen zu bilden
word.rem: appears quite often; jisho has n1

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】【的：てき】には【問：もん】【題：だい】ないよ。
sentence.rom: Watashi-teki ni wa mondai nai yo.
sentence.tr_en: It's not a problem for me personally.
sentence.tr_de: Das ist kein Problem für mich persönlich.
sentence.explanation_en: 私的に emphasises that it’s just your take.
sentence.explanation_de: 私的に betont, dass es nur die eigene Meinung ist.

sentence.s: 【世：せ】【界：かい】【的：てき】に【日：に】【本：ほん】【語：ご】が【話：はな】せる【人：ひと】が【増：ふ】えているようだ。
sentence.rom: Sekai-teki ni Nihon-go ga hanaseru hito ga fuete iru yō da.
sentence.tr_en: It seems that the number of people worldwide who can speak Japanese is increasing.
sentence.tr_de: Es scheint, dass weltweit die Anzahl Leute, die Japanisch können, zunimmt.

sentence.s: 【自：じ】【由：ゆう】な【暮：く】らしを【楽：たの】しんでいます。
sentence.rom: Jiyū na kurashi o tanoshinde imasu.
sentence.tr_en: I'm enjoying a free lifestyle.
sentence.tr_de: Ich geniesse das Leben in Freiheit.

sentence.s: 【一：ひと】【人：り】【暮：ぐ】らしを【始：はじ】めてから、【料：りょう】【理：り】をすることが【増：ふ】えました。
sentence.rom: Hitori-gurashi o hajimete kara, ryōri o suru koto ga fuemashita.
sentence.tr_en: Since I started living alone, I’ve been cooking more.
sentence.tr_de: Seit ich alleine wohne, koche ich öfter.

word.rem: jisho has n1 for the word, but n3 for the kanji; appears in GENKI2 p.313

phrase.tr_de: junge Dame; Tochter von jem. anderem
phrase.rem: jisho has nx; jisho has 'young lady of pampered upbringing', but ChatGPT disagrees

sentence.s: 【神：かみ】【様：さま】を【信：しん】じますか。
sentence.rom: Kami-sama o shinjimasu ka?
sentence.tr_en: Do you believe in God?
sentence.tr_de: Glauben Sie an Gott?

sentence.s: お【客：きゃく】【様：さま】がお【着：つ】きになりました。
sentence.rom: O-kyaku-sama ga o-tsuki ni narimashita.
sentence.tr_en: The guest has arrived.
sentence.tr_de: Der Gast ist angekommen.

sentence.s: 【自：じ】【動：どう】【販：はん】【売：ばい】【機：き】を【使：つか】いたいので、【１：いち】【万：まん】【円：えん】【札：さつ】を【細：こま】かくしてくれませんか。
sentence.rom: Jidōhanbaiki o tsukaitai no de, ichi-man-en satsu o komakaku shite kuremasen ka?
sentence.tr_en: I want to use the vending machine, so could you break this 10'000 yen bill for me?
sentence.tr_de: Da ich den Automat benutzen möchte, könnten Sie mir diese 10'000-Yen-Note in Kleingeld verwandeln?

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】はコンピューターなしでは【仕：し】【事：ごと】ができない。
sentence.rom: Watashi wa konpyūtā nashi de wa shigoto ga dekinai.
sentence.tr_en: I can't do my job without a computer.
sentence.tr_de: Ich kann meine Arbeit nicht ohne Computer erledigen.
sentence.rem: rated n3 because of nashi de; jisho has nx for nashi de

phrase.ph: 【授：じゅ】【業：ぎょう】【中：ちゅう】に
phrase.rem: appears in vocab section; jisho has nx

word.rem: not a good word
not a good word without context

word.tr_en: former; ex-; past; one-time; earlier times; the past; previous state; formerly; previously; originally; before

part; portion; share / amount; worth (as in 'two days' worth'); enough (for) / one's means; one's place; one's lot; one's social position / one's duty; one's part / condition; state (of affairs); extent; rate (as in 'at this rate') / in proportion to; just as much as; to the same degree / content (e.g. alcohol); percentage / equivalent to (e.g. an old brother)
word.hint_en: noun; noun, used as a suffix / noun, used as a suffix / noun; adverb (fukushi) / noun, used as a suffix

word.tr_en: old; former; ex- / the old; old things; old customs / old times; bygone days / Japan's old (lunisolar) calendar
at any moment now; on the verge of
anyway; somehow or other; in any case
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L21 vocab section
could be a phrase of iu
appears in Doraemon 0, p.21, and 500mon N3 q56

sentence.s: 【大：たい】したことない。
sentence.rom: Tai shita koto nai.
sentence.tr_en: It's no big deal.
sentence.tr_de: Keine grosse Sache.
sentence.rem: 500mon N3 q56 has taishita koto ga nai (with ga)

sentence.s: 【大：たい】した【病：びょう】【気：き】ではありません。
sentence.rom: Tai shita byōki de wa arimasen.
sentence.tr_en: The illness is nothing serious.
sentence.tr_de: Die Krankheit ist nichts Ernstes.

word.tr_en: as it is called; the so-called

word.rem: needs an example

word.tr_en: what kind of; what sort of; what / no matter what (kind of); whatever; any; all
word.rem: why is this n3???

word.tr_en: to influence; to have an effect on
word.rem: suru verb kept in only to silence find-missing
suru verb kept in only to silence find-missing
is now a phrase of koi-love; jisho has n1
jisho has n1

word.hint_en: ref. to an equal or inferior; can be rude; rarely used outside movies
word.hint_de: bezogen auf gleichen oder niedrigeren Rang; kann unhöflich sein

word.rem: appears in 500mon q128, q436; also in 500mon N3 q57; jisho has nx

sentence.s: 【主：しゅ】【人：じん】は【野：や】【菜：さい】しか【食：た】べません。
sentence.rom: Shujin wa yasai shika tabemasen.
sentence.tr_en: My husband eats nothing but vegetables.
sentence.tr_de: Mein Ehemann isst nichts als Gemüse.
sentence.rem: jisho has nx for shika; jisho has nx for shujin, but n4 for go-shujin

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】は【日：に】【本：ほん】【語：ご】が【少：すこ】ししか【話：はな】せません。
sentence.rom: Watashi wa Nihon-go ga sukoshi shika hanasemasen.
sentence.tr_en: I can only speak a little bit of Japanese.
sentence.tr_de: Ich kann nur wenig japanisch sprechen.

sentence.s: 【考：かんが】えてもどうにもならない。【忘：わす】れるしかない。
sentence.rom: Kangaete mo dō ni mo naranai. Wasureru shika nai.
sentence.tr_en: There's no use thinking about it. You might as well just forget it.
sentence.tr_de: Es bringt nichts, darüber nachzudenken. Am besten, du vergisst es einfach.

sentence.s: もうバスはない。【歩：ある】くしかない。
sentence.rom: Mō basu wa nai. Aruku shika nai.
sentence.tr_en: There is no longer a bus. I've got no choice but to walk.
sentence.tr_de: Es fährt kein Bus mehr. Es bleibt nichts anderes übrig, als zu Fuss zu gehen.

sentence.s: だれもいない。【私：わたし】がやるしかない。
sentence.rom: Dare mo inai. Watashi ga yaru shika nai.
sentence.tr_en: There's nobody here. I'll have to do it myself.
sentence.tr_de: Niemand ist da. Ich muss es wohl alleine machen.

sentence.s: 【歩：ある】いて【行：い】こうか、それとも【車：くるま】で【行：い】こうか。
sentence.rom: Aruite ikō ka, soretomo kuruma de ikō ka?
sentence.tr_en: Shall we walk or go by car?
sentence.tr_de: Gehen wir zu Fuss oder mit dem Auto?

word.tr_en: or; either ... or; maybe; perhaps; possibly; some ... and others ...; sometimes ... and at other times ...
word.rem: unclear if it's ha or wa

word.tr_en: that is (to say); namely; i.e. / precisely; exactly; just; nothing but; neither more nor less / (and) then
if; when; and; with; used for quoting (thoughts, speech, etc.); promoted pawn; indicates a question; To (kana)
after all; because; but; even; too; as well; also; they say; I hear; you mean
even so; however; still; whereupon; even though; nevertheless; on the contrary; as a matter of fact; despite
but; however; (and) yet; nevertheless; still; for all that
so; therefore; accordingly; consequently; on those grounds; that is why; for that reason

sentence.s: 【明：あ】けましておめでとうございます。
sentence.rom: Akemashite omedetō gozaimasu.
sentence.tr_en: Happy new year! (polite)
sentence.tr_de: Frohes neues Jahr! (höflich)

word.tr_en: not always; not necessarily; not entirely
word.tr_de: nicht immer; nicht unbedingt; nicht ganz

sentence.s: 【外：がい】【国：こく】【人：じん】が【必：かなら】ずしも【英：えい】【語：ご】ができるとは【限：かぎ】らない。
sentence.rom: Gaikokujin ga kanarazu shi mo eigo ga dekiru to wa kagiranai.
sentence.tr_en: It doesn't necessarily follow that all foreigners speak English.
sentence.tr_de: Man kann nicht unbedingt folgern, dass alle Ausländer Englisch können.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L20 vocab section and 500mon N3 q29 (example not usable); jisho has n2

word.tr_de: ich frage mich, ob; ich könnte; irgendwie
word.rem: jisho has nx; appears frequently (high in jisho-top-words)

sentence.s: 【誰：だれ】が【一：いち】【番：ばん】【速：はや】く【泳：およ】げるかしら。
sentence.rom: Dare ga ichi-ban hayaku oyogeru kashira.
sentence.tr_en: I wonder who can swim fastest.
sentence.tr_de: Ich frage mich, wer wohl am schnellsten schwimmen kann.

word.tr_en: speaking of which; now that you mention it
word.tr_de: wenn wir gerade davon reden; jetzt, wo du es sagst
word.rem: jisho has n2; should be inside a sentence of some other word
jisho has n2

word.tr_en: to address so.; to start a conversation
word.rem: jisho has n2
is this really n3? irassharu is n4

word.tr_en: to that extent; to that degree
